subject: Re: main house sept 2
body:
I can see you Monday afternoon.

--- jpm6929@aol.com wrote:

>   Jeffrey,I hope you are doing well. I finished my
> investigation with the Library at Prague, I'm
> sending you the new building configuration.Also this
> is the revised floor plan for the main house.
>  The Library is set at 124.
>   As we couldn't go to visit Guermantes now, I am
> returning to New York tomorow Sunday, and Monday I
> will be at the office. In the meantime, I am at the
> country house.Regards,J.P.
>

body_html:
I can see you Monday afternoon.

--- jpm6929@aol.com wrote:

Jeffrey,I hope you are doing well. I finished my
investigation with the Library at Prague, I'm
sending you the new building configuration.Also this
is the revised floor plan for the main house.
The Library is set at 124.
As we couldn't go to visit Guermantes now, I am
returning to New York tomorow Sunday, and Monday I
will be at the office. In the meantime, I am at the
country house.Regards,J.P.
